response.original_title: ((Add~More~Guests)) How do i add another extra passenger or guest to my Disney Cruise Booking? Complete Process Explained
response.overview: To add a room or guest to an existing Disney cruise booking, you must contact Disney Cruises directly at +1⇢(833)⇢624⇢0944 (US) or ) or your travel agent to verify cabin capacity and availability. Adding a passenger to an +1⇢(833)⇢624⇢0944 Disney cruise booking is generally possible, provided the cabin and ship have capacity, typically by calling Disney at +1⇢(833)⇢624⇢0944 or contacting your travel agent. The new passenger will be added at the current, +1⇢(833)⇢624⇢0944 prevailing rate, and you may need to move to a cabin with higher occupancy (3-4 berths). To add passengers to an existing Disney cruise reservation, call Disney directly at +1⇢(833)⇢624⇢0944 or , or contact your travel agent to check stateroom capacity and availability. Contact Disney Cruises at +1⇢(833)⇢624⇢0944 (USA) or your travel agent directly to check for stateroom capacity and updated pricing. We don't have any crew added to this movie. You can help by adding some!
